name: OpenAlex search
description: Search the open academic literature via OpenAlex (240M+ works, no API key, includes Latin-American journals via Redalyc/Scielo). Returns title, authors, year, DOI, venue, abstract, citation count and OA URL when available. Use for literature reviews, citation hunts, finding the canonical paper for a concept, year-bounded scans.

query.description: Free-text query (topic, concept, author + topic). 2-12 words works best.

limit.description: Max number of works to return. Default 20.

lang.description: ISO 639-1 (e.g. 'es', 'en', 'pt'). Filters works to that language when set.
